    59→
    60→######################################################################
    61→# Shared test helpers (migrated from rbt_testbench.sh)
    62→
    63→rbtb_show() {
    64→  test "${BURD_VERBOSE:-0}" != "1" || echo "RBTSHOW: $*"
    65→}
    66→
    67→rbtb_load_nameplate() {
    68→  local z_moniker="${1:-}"
    69→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "rbtb_load_nameplate: moniker argument required"
    70→
    71→  rbtb_show "Loading nameplate: ${z_moniker}"

    75→
    76→  rbtb_show "Loading RBRR"
    77→  rbrr_load
    78→
    79→  rbtb_show "Kindling RBGC/RBGD/RBOB"
    80→  zrbgc_kindle
    81→  zrbgd_kindle
    82→  zrbob_kindle
    83→}
    84→
    85→rbtb_exec_sentry() {
    86→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" "$@"
    87→}
    88→
    89→rbtb_exec_sentry_i() {
    90→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" "$@"
    91→}
    92→
    93→rbtb_exec_censer() {
    94→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" "$@"
    95→}
    96→
    97→rbtb_exec_censer_i() {
    98→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" "$@"
    99→}
   100→
   101→rbtb_exec_bottle() {
   102→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" "$@"
   103→}
   104→
   105→rbtb_exec_bottle_i() {
   106→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" "$@"
   107→}
   108→
   109→######################################################################
   110→# Setup functions
   111→
   112→zrbtb_kick_tsuite_setup() {
   113→  buto_trace "Setup for kick-tires suite (no-op)"
   114→}
   115→
   116→zrbtb_qualify_tsuite_setup() {
   117→  buto_trace "Setup for qualify-all suite"
   118→  source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbq_Qualify.sh"
   119→  zrbq_kindle
   120→}
   121→
   122→zrbtb_ark_tsuite_setup() {
   123→  buto_trace "Setup for ark-lifecycle suite"
   124→  ZRBTB_ARK_VESSEL_SIGIL="trbim-macos"
   125→}
   126→
   127→zrbtb_dispatch_tsuite_setup() {
   128→  buto_trace "Setup for dispatch-exercise suite"
   129→  buz_blazon ZBUTCDE_TEST_COLOPHON "butctt" "butcde_DispatchExercise" "butcde_run"
   130→}
   131→
   132→zrbtb_nsproto_tsuite_setup() {
   133→  buto_trace "Setup for nsproto-security suite"
   134→  rbtb_load_nameplate "nsproto"
   135→}
   136→
   137→zrbtb_srjcl_tsuite_setup() {
   138→  buto_trace "Setup for srjcl-jupyter suite"
   139→  rbtb_load_nameplate "srjcl"
   140→}
   141→
   142→zrbtb_pluml_tsuite_setup() {
   143→  buto_trace "Setup for pluml-diagram suite"
   144→  rbtb_load_nameplate "pluml"
   145→}
   146→
   147→zrbtb_xname_tsuite_setup() {
   148→  buto_trace "Setup for xname-validation suite (no-op)"
   149→}
   150→
   151→zrbtb_regime_tsuite_setup() {
   152→  buto_trace "Setup for regime-smoke suite (no-op)"
   153→}
   154→
   155→zrbtb_credentials_tsuite_setup() {
   156→  buto_trace "Setup for regime-credentials suite (no-op)"
   157→}
   158→
   159→
   160→######################################################################
   161→# Registration
   162→
   163→rbtb_kindle() {
   164→  butr_kindle
   165→
   166→  # kick-tires suite
   167→  butr_suite_enroll "kick-tires" "" "zrbtb_kick_tsuite_setup"
   168→  butr_case_enroll "kick-tires" rbtckk_false_tcase
   169→  butr_case_enroll "kick-tires" rbtckk_true_tcase
   170→
   171→  # qualify-all suite
   172→  butr_suite_enroll "qualify-all" "" "zrbtb_qualify_tsuite_setup"
   173→  butr_case_enroll "qualify-all" rbtcqa_qualify_all_tcase
   174→
   175→  # ark-lifecycle suite
   176→  butr_suite_enroll "ark-lifecycle" "" "zrbtb_ark_tsuite_setup"
   177→  butr_case_enroll "ark-lifecycle" rbtcal_lifecycle_tcase
   178→
   179→  # dispatch-exercise suite
   180→  butr_suite_enroll "dispatch-exercise" "" "zrbtb_dispatch_tsuite_setup"
   181→  butr_case_enroll "dispatch-exercise" butcde_burv_isolation_tcase
   182→  butr_case_enroll "dispatch-exercise" butcde_evidence_created_tcase
   183→  butr_case_enroll "dispatch-exercise" butcde_exit_capture_tcase
   184→
   185→  # nsproto-security suite
   186→  butr_suite_enroll "nsproto-security" "" "zrbtb_nsproto_tsuite_setup"
   187→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_basic_dnsmasq_tcase
   188→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_basic_iptables_tcase
   189→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_basic_ping_sentry_tcase
   190→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_block_packages_tcase
   191→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_allow_anthropic_tcase
   192→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_altport_tcase
   193→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_cloudflare_tcase
   194→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_direct_tcase
   195→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_google_tcase
   196→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_ipv6_tcase
   197→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_multicast_tcase
   198→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_quad9_tcase
   199→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_spoofing_tcase
   200→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_tunneling_tcase
   201→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_zonetransfer_tcase
   202→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_nonexist_tcase
   203→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_notcp_tcase
   204→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_tcp_tcase
   205→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_icmp_block_beyond_tcase
   206→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_icmp_sentry_only_tcase
   207→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_tcp443_allow_anthropic_tcase
   208→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_tcp443_block_google_tcase
   209→
   210→  # srjcl-jupyter suite
   211→  butr_suite_enroll "srjcl-jupyter" "" "zrbtb_srjcl_tsuite_setup"
   212→  butr_case_enroll "srjcl-jupyter" rbtcsj_jupyter_connectivity_tcase
   213→  butr_case_enroll "srjcl-jupyter" rbtcsj_jupyter_running_tcase
   214→  butr_case_enroll "srjcl-jupyter" rbtcsj_websocket_kernel_tcase
   215→
   216→  # pluml-diagram suite
   217→  butr_suite_enroll "pluml-diagram" "" "zrbtb_pluml_tsuite_setup"
   218→  butr_case_enroll "pluml-diagram" rbtcpl_http_headers_tcase
   219→  butr_case_enroll "pluml-diagram" rbtcpl_invalid_hash_tcase
   220→  butr_case_enroll "pluml-diagram" rbtcpl_local_diagram_tcase
   221→  butr_case_enroll "pluml-diagram" rbtcpl_malformed_diagram_tcase
   222→  butr_case_enroll "pluml-diagram" rbtcpl_text_rendering_tcase
   223→
   224→  # regime-smoke suite
   225→  butr_suite_enroll "regime-smoke" "" "zrbtb_regime_tsuite_setup"
   226→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_burc_tcase
   227→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_burs_tcase
   228→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_rbrn_tcase
   229→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_rbrr_tcase
   230→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_rbrv_tcase
   231→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_rbrp_tcase
   232→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_burd_tcase
   233→
   234→  # regime-credentials suite (requires workstation credentials)
   235→  butr_suite_enroll "regime-credentials" "" "zrbtb_credentials_tsuite_setup"
   236→  butr_case_enroll "regime-credentials" butcrg_rbra_tcase
   237→  butr_case_enroll "regime-credentials" butcrg_rbro_tcase
   238→  butr_case_enroll "regime-credentials" butcrg_rbrs_tcase
   239→
   240→  # xname-validation suite
   241→  butr_suite_enroll "xname-validation" "" "zrbtb_xname_tsuite_setup"
   242→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_debug_tcase
   243→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_defaults_tcase
   244→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_empty_optional_tcase
   245→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_env_wrapper_tcase
   246→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_invalid_chars_tcase
   247→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_invalid_start_tcase
   248→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_length_tcase
   249→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_valid_tcase
   250→
   251→}
   252→
   253→######################################################################
   254→# Routing
   255→
   256→rbtb_route() {
   257→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   258→  shift || true
   259→
   260→  zburd_sentinel
   261→
   262→  rbtb_kindle
   263→
   264→  export ZBUTE_ROOT_TEMP_DIR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
   265→  export BUT_VERBOSE="${BUT_VERBOSE:-0}"
   266→
   267→  case "${z_command}" in
   268→    rbw-ta) butd_run_all ;;
   269→    rbw-ts) butd_run_suite "${1:-}" ;;
   270→    rbw-to) butd_run_one "${1:-}" ;;
   271→    rbw-tn)
   272→      local z_imprint="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
   273→      case "${z_imprint}" in
   274→        nsproto) butd_run_suite "nsproto-security" ;;
   275→        srjcl)  butd_run_suite "srjcl-jupyter" ;;
   276→        pluml)  butd_run_suite "pluml-diagram" ;;
   277→        *)      buc_die "rbw-tn: unknown nameplate imprint '${z_imprint}' (expected: nsproto, srjcl, pluml)" ;;
   278→      esac
   279→      ;;
   280→    rbw-trg) butd_run_suite "regime-smoke" ;;
   281→    rbw-trc) butd_run_suite "regime-credentials" ;;
   282→    *)
   283→      if [ -n "${z_command}" ]; then
   284→        buc_warn "Unknown command: ${z_command}"
   285→      fi
   286→      buc_info "Available test commands:"
   287→      buc_info "  rbw-ta   Run all suites"
   288→      buc_info "  rbw-ts   Run single suite (pass suite name)"
   289→      buc_info "  rbw-to   Run single test function (pass function name)"
   290→      buc_info "  rbw-tn   Run nameplate suite (imprint: nsproto, srjcl, pluml)"
   291→      buc_info "  rbw-trg  Run regime-smoke suite"
   292→      buc_info "  rbw-trc  Run regime-credentials suite"
   293→      return 0
   294→      ;;
   295→  esac
   296→}
   297→
   298→rbtb_main() {
   299→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   300→  shift || true
   301→  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
   302→  rbtb_route "${z_command}" "$@"
   303→}
   304→
   305→rbtb_main "$@"
   306→
   307→# eof
   308→

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# RBTB Testbench - Recipe Bottle test framework testbench

set -euo pipefail

RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"

# Source dependencies
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
source "${BURC_BUK_DIR}/burd_regime.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/bute_engine.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/butr_registry.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/butd_dispatch.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buz_zipper.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbz_zipper.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_regime.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrv_regime.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbob_bottle.sh"

# Source test case files
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtckk_KickTires.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtcqa_QualifyAll.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtcal_ArkLifecycle.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/butcde_DispatchExercise.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtcns_NsproSecurity.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtcsj_SrjclJupyter.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtcpl_PlumlDiagram.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/butcvu_XnameValidation.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/butcrg_RegimeSmoke.sh"
source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/butcrg_RegimeCredentials.sh"

buc_context "${0##*/}"
zburd_kindle
zrbcc_kindle
zbuz_kindle
zrbz_kindle

######################################################################
# Shared test helpers (migrated from rbt_testbench.sh)

rbtb_show() {
  test "${BURE_VERBOSE:-0}" != "1" || echo "RBTSHOW: $*"
}

rbtb_load_nameplate() {
  local z_moniker="${1:-}"
  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "rbtb_load_nameplate: moniker argument required"

  rbtb_show "Loading nameplate: ${z_moniker}"
  rbrn_load_moniker "${z_moniker}"

  rbtb_show "Nameplate loaded: RBRN_MONIKER=${RBRN_MONIKER}, RBRN_RUNTIME=${RBRN_RUNTIME}"

  rbtb_show "Loading RBRR"
  rbrr_load

  rbtb_show "Kindling RBGC/RBGD/RBOB"
  zrbgc_kindle
  zrbgd_kindle
  zrbob_kindle
}

rbtb_exec_sentry() {
  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" "$@"
}

rbtb_exec_sentry_i() {
  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" "$@"
}

rbtb_exec_censer() {
  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" "$@"
}

rbtb_exec_censer_i() {
  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" "$@"
}

rbtb_exec_bottle() {
  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" "$@"
}

rbtb_exec_bottle_i() {
  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" "$@"
}

######################################################################
# Setup functions

zrbtb_kick_tsuite_setup() {
  buto_trace "Setup for kick-tires suite (no-op)"
}

zrbtb_qualify_tsuite_setup() {
  buto_trace "Setup for qualify-all suite"
  source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbq_Qualify.sh"
  zrbq_kindle
}

zrbtb_ark_tsuite_setup() {
  buto_trace "Setup for ark-lifecycle suite"
  ZRBTB_ARK_VESSEL_SIGIL="trbim-macos"
}

zrbtb_dispatch_tsuite_setup() {
  buto_trace "Setup for dispatch-exercise suite"
  buz_blazon ZBUTCDE_TEST_COLOPHON "butctt" "butcde_DispatchExercise" "butcde_run"
}

zrbtb_nsproto_tsuite_setup() {
  buto_trace "Setup for nsproto-security suite"
  rbtb_load_nameplate "nsproto"
}

zrbtb_srjcl_tsuite_setup() {
  buto_trace "Setup for srjcl-jupyter suite"
  rbtb_load_nameplate "srjcl"
}

zrbtb_pluml_tsuite_setup() {
  buto_trace "Setup for pluml-diagram suite"
  rbtb_load_nameplate "pluml"
}

zrbtb_xname_tsuite_setup() {
  buto_trace "Setup for xname-validation suite (no-op)"
}

zrbtb_regime_tsuite_setup() {
  buto_trace "Setup for regime-smoke suite (no-op)"
}

zrbtb_credentials_tsuite_setup() {
  buto_trace "Setup for regime-credentials suite (no-op)"
}


######################################################################
# Registration

rbtb_kindle() {
  butr_kindle

  # kick-tires suite
  butr_suite_enroll "kick-tires" "" "zrbtb_kick_tsuite_setup"
  butr_case_enroll "kick-tires" rbtckk_false_tcase
  butr_case_enroll "kick-tires" rbtckk_true_tcase

  # qualify-all suite
  butr_suite_enroll "qualify-all" "" "zrbtb_qualify_tsuite_setup"

######################################################################
# Routing

rbtb_route() {
  local z_command="${1:-}"
  shift || true

  zburd_sentinel

  rbtb_kindle

  export ZBUTE_ROOT_TEMP_DIR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
  export BUT_VERBOSE="${BUT_VERBOSE:-0}"

  case "${z_command}" in
    rbw-ta) butd_run_all ;;
    rbw-ts) butd_run_suite "${1:-}" ;;
    rbw-to) butd_run_one "${1:-}" ;;
    rbw-tn)
      local z_imprint="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
      case "${z_imprint}" in
        nsproto) butd_run_suite "nsproto-security" ;;
        srjcl)  butd_run_suite "srjcl-jupyter" ;;
        pluml)  butd_run_suite "pluml-diagram" ;;
        *)      buc_die "rbw-tn: unknown nameplate imprint '${z_imprint}' (expected: nsproto, srjcl, pluml)" ;;
      esac
      ;;
    rbw-trg) butd_run_suite "regime-smoke" ;;
    rbw-trc) butd_run_suite "regime-credentials" ;;
    *)
      if [ -n "${z_command}" ]; then
        buc_warn "Unknown command: ${z_command}"
      fi
      buc_info "Available test commands:"
      buc_info "  rbw-ta   Run all suites"
      buc_info "  rbw-ts   Run single suite (pass suite name)"
      buc_info "  rbw-to   Run single test function (pass function name)"
      buc_info "  rbw-tn   Run nameplate suite (imprint: nsproto, srjcl, pluml)"
      buc_info "  rbw-trg  Run regime-smoke suite"
      buc_info "  rbw-trc  Run regime-credentials suite"
      return 0
      ;;
  esac
}

rbtb_main() {
  local z_command="${1:-}"
  shift || true
  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
  rbtb_route "${z_command}" "$@"
}

rbtb_main "$@"
